title: evolvulus pterygophyllus
intro: Evolvulus pterygophyllus, also known as dwarf blue dancer or blue evolvulus, is a species of flowering plant in the family Convolvulaceae. It is native to the tropical regions of Central and South America and has been traditionally used in folk medicine due to its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Evolvulus pterygophyllus include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and promote wound healing. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
